languages.text: {n}Зенитки, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}усмиренные Экзальтом-117{/d}, синхронно оживают. Каждая выпускает несколько очередей, и "Валькирии" вынужденно отступают, сбросив снаряды лишь на подходе к дворцу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Зенитки, усмиренные Экзальтом-117, синхронно оживают. Каждая выпускает несколько очередей, и "Валькирии" вынужденно отступают, сбросив снаряды лишь на подходе к дворцу.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}尊使-117的安抚{/d}下，防空炮组整齐划一地开火。每门火炮都在连续射击，逼得瓦尔基里机群提前投弹撤离，因此轰炸只落在通往宫殿的外围区域。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}尊使-117的安抚{/d}下，防空炮组整齐划一地开火。每门火炮都在连续射击，逼得瓦尔基里机群提前投弹撤离，因此轰炸只落在通往宫殿的外围区域。{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Apaisée par Exalt-117{/d}, la batterie d'artillerie antiaérienne passe à l'action. Ses canons tirent à l'unisson plusieurs volées qui forcent les Valkyries à larguer leurs bombes prématurément avant de se replier, de sorte que leurs frappes ne touchent que les abords du palais.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Apaisée par Exalt-117{/d}, la batterie d'artillerie antiaérienne passe à l'action. Ses canons tirent à l'unisson plusieurs volées qui forcent les Valkyries à larguer leurs bombes prématurément avant de se replier, de sorte que leurs frappes ne touchent que les abords du palais.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Yüce-117'nin yatıştırdığı{/d} hava savunma bataryası, mükemmel bir uyum içinde harekete geçiyor. Her bir top, birkaç atış yaparak Valkürleri mermilerini erken bırakmaya ve geri çekilmeye zorluyor. Böylece saldırıları sadece sarayın yakınlarına isabet ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Yüce-117'nin yatıştırdığı{/d} hava savunma bataryası, mükemmel bir uyum içinde harekete geçiyor. Her bir top, birkaç atış yaparak Valkürleri mermilerini erken bırakmaya ve geri çekilmeye zorluyor. Böylece saldırıları sadece sarayın yakınlarına isabet ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La batería antiaérea, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}apaciguada gracias a Exaltado-117{/d}, cobra vida al unísono. Cada arma dispara varias rondas, lo que obliga a las Valkyries a soltar sus proyectiles antes de tiempo y retirarse, de modo que solo dañan el camino hacia el palacio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La batería antiaérea, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}apaciguada gracias a Exaltado-117{/d}, cobra vida al unísono. Cada arma dispara varias rondas, lo que obliga a las Valkyries a soltar sus proyectiles antes de tiempo y retirarse, de modo que solo dañan el camino hacia el palacio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die nun {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}von Exalt-117 besänftigte{/d} Flugabwehrbatterie eröffnet in perfektem Einklang das Feuer. Jedes Geschütz feuert mehrere Salven ab und zwingt die Walküren, ihre Bomben vorzeitig auszuklinken und abzudrehen, wodurch ihre Angriffe nur die Zugangsstraße zum Palast treffen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die nun {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}von Exalt-117 besänftigte{/d} Flugabwehrbatterie eröffnet in perfektem Einklang das Feuer. Jedes Geschütz feuert mehrere Salven ab und zwingt die Walküren, ihre Bomben vorzeitig auszuklinken und abzudrehen, wodurch ihre Angriffe nur die Zugangsstraße zum Palast treffen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}エクサルト117によって鎮められた{/d}防空砲は、完璧な連携で動き出した。各砲が数発の連射で、ヴァルキリーは弾を早々に落として撤退。宮殿への接近地点にのみ攻撃が集中した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The air defence battery, now {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}appeased by Exalt-117{/d}, stirs into action in perfect unison. Each gun fires several bursts, forcing the Valkyries to drop their shells early and retreat, so their strikes land only on the approach to the palace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}エクサルト117によって鎮められた{/d}防空砲は、完璧な連携で動き出した。各砲が数発の連射で、ヴァルキリーは弾を早々に落として撤退。宮殿への接近地点にのみ攻撃が集中した。{/n}
